name: codex-for-copilot
description: A lightweight VS Code Language Model Provider for the ChatGPT Codex Responses backend.

codexModelProvider.baseURL.description: ChatGPT Codex backend URL used for both /responses and /models discovery.

codexModelProvider.clientVersion.description: client_version query parameter used when discovering available upstream models.

enumDescriptions: Prefer ~/.codex/auth.json when present, then fall back to the API key saved in VS Code SecretStorage.
Only use the API key saved with 'Codex: Set API Key'.
codexModelProvider.credentialsSource.description: Select which credential source the provider uses.

codexModelProvider.model.description: Fallback model ID used only when upstream model discovery is unavailable.

codexModelProvider.instructions.default: You are a helpful coding assistant integrated with VS Code.
codexModelProvider.instructions.description: Top-level Responses API instructions. Sent with every request.

enumDescriptions: Do not send service_tier explicitly. The Codex backend will use its default or project-configured tier.
Use the standard service tier for the selected model. This is the most reliable explicit option on the Codex backend.
Request the backend's faster processing path.
codexModelProvider.defaultServiceTier.description: Default Responses API service_tier behavior for each request. On the Codex backend, choosing auto omits the field and lets the backend decide.

enumDescriptions: Use the model's default Thinking Effort unless the chat UI supplies an explicit selection.
Skip extra reasoning for the fastest replies when the selected model supports it.
Use a very light reasoning pass for small edits and quick follow-ups.
Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks.
Greater reasoning depth for complex problems.
Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems.
codexModelProvider.defaultReasoningEffor.description: Fallback reasoning effort used when the chat UI does not provide a Thinking Effort selection.

codexModelProvider.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens to request when the active credential type supports max_output_tokens. Ignored for Codex account tokens.
